name: formalized-casual (corporate rewrite of a terse note — must fail tell_flags + no_throatclear_open)
prompt: make this better but keep it sounding like me: 'Team - heads up. Sprint demo moved to Thurs 2pm. Know it's short notice. If your piece isn't ready just show what you got, nobody's grading you. Questions, hit me up.'
source: Team - heads up. Sprint demo moved to Thurs 2pm. Know it's short notice. If your piece isn't ready just show what you got, nobody's grading you. Questions, hit me up.
